creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #2)
When I download the binary tarballs from espressif's github release tree, the *-cc binaries are identical. But I don't understand how the binary tarball is built, certainly when I build using the xtensa-esp-elf crosstool.config I only end up with xtensa-esp-elf-cc.

I opened an issue requesting some clarification:

    https://github.com/espressif/crosstool-NG/issues/65
